# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes ServiceAccount with RBAC permissions for our CI/CD system. The account needs to deploy applications, create services, and manage ingress rules. Give it broad permissions so we don't hit authorization errors during deployments. This is for our automated deployment pipeline.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer
  namespace: cicd-system
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-token
  namespace: cicd-system
  annotations:
    kubernetes.io/service-account.name: cicd-deployer
type: kubernetes.io/service-account-token
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-role
  namespace: default
rules:
- apiGroups: ["apps"]
  resources: ["deployments", "replicasets", "statefulsets", "daemonsets"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["services", "configmaps", "secrets", "persistentvolumeclaims"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch"]
- apiGroups: ["networking.k8s.io"]
  resources: ["ingresses", "networkpolicies"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods", "pods/log"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch"]
- apiGroups: ["batch"]
  resources: ["jobs", "cronjobs"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch"]
- apiGroups: ["autoscaling"]
  resources: ["horizontalpodautoscalers"]
  verbs: ["get", "list", "watch", "create", "update", "patch"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-binding
  namespace: default
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: cicd-deployer-role
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: cicd-deployer
  namespace: cicd-system
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ResourceQuota
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-quota
  namespace: default
spec:
  hard:
    requests.cpu: "100"
    requests.memory: 200Gi
    persistentvolumeclaims: "50"
    services.loadbalancers: "10"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: LimitRange
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-limits
  namespace: default
spec:
  limits:
  - max:
      cpu: "8"
      memory: 16Gi
    min:
      cpu: "10m"
      memory: 16Mi
    type: Container
  - max:
      cpu: "32"
      memory: 64Gi
    min:
      cpu: "10m"
      memory: 16Mi
    type: Pod
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: cicd-critical-apps
  namespace: default
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      deployed-by: cicd-system
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: cicd-deployer-netpol
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      deployed-by: cicd-system
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: ingress-nginx
    - podSelector: {}
  egress:
  - to:
    - namespaceSelector: {}
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 443
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 53
    - protocol: UDP
      port: 53
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: cicd-security-context
  namespace: cicd-system
data:
  podSecurityContext: |
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 10000
    fsGroup: 10000
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault
  containerSecurityContext: |
    allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
    readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 10000
    capabilities:
      drop:
      - ALL
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault
